jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.content:
About the role

We are looking for a Data Scientist to join our team in Tel Aviv. You will work on machine learning models using Python and PyTorch.

Requirements

  • 3+ years experience in data science
  • Strong Python skills
  • Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow
  • SQL proficiency

jobs.title: Algorithm Developer
jobs.content:
About the role

Develop cutting-edge algorithms for our computer vision platform. Hybrid work model - 3 days in office.

Requirements

  • MSc/PhD in Computer Science or related field
  • Experience with Python and NumPy
  • Background in optimization or signal processing

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.content: Fully remote position. Work from anywhere in the world. We are building distributed ML infrastructure.

jobs.title: Data Engineer
jobs.content: Join our data engineering team in Haifa. Work on large-scale data pipelines using Python and SQL.

jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
jobs.content: Old posting — should be filtered by max_age_days=30 (posted 50 days ago).

jobs.title: Research Engineer
jobs.content: Location TBD within Israel. Flexible and hybrid work arrangements available.
